name: Bearblocker
desc: During your opponent's turn, Set cards in your Spell & Trap Zones cannot be destroyed by card effects. If a Set card(s) in your Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: This card gains 800 ATK until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: During your opponent's turn, Set cards in your Spell & Trap Zones cannot be destroyed by card effects. If a Set card(s) in your Spell & Trap Zone is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: This card gains 800 ATK until the end of this turn.

mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
